'''鈭歨-y-h''' ('''kahayah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:osteosynthesize|osteosynthesize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osteosynthesize|osteosynthesize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-y-h
|-
! Lemma
| kahayah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihayah|thihayah]] || [[word:jihayah|jihayah]] || [[word:shihayah|shihayah]] || [[word:kihayah|kihayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhayah|thuthuhayah]] || [[word:jujuhayah|jujuhayah]] || [[word:shushuhayah|shushuhayah]] || [[word:kukuhayah|kukuhayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhayah|thuhayah]] || [[word:juhayah|juhayah]] || [[word:shuhayah|shuhayah]] || [[word:kuhayah|kuhayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhayah|thuhayah]] || [[word:juhayah|juhayah]] || [[word:shuhayah|shuhayah]] || [[word:kuhayah|kuhayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehayah|thehayah]] || [[word:jehayah|jehayah]] || [[word:shehayah|shehayah]] || [[word:kehayah|kehayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohayah|thothohayah]] || [[word:jojohayah|jojohayah]] || [[word:shoshohayah|shoshohayah]] || [[word:kokohayah|kokohayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohayah|thohayah]] || [[word:johayah|johayah]] || [[word:shohayah|shohayah]] || [[word:kohayah|kohayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohayah|thohayah]] || [[word:johayah|johayah]] || [[word:shohayah|shohayah]] || [[word:kohayah|kohayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙hayah|th忙hayah]] || [[word:j忙hayah|j忙hayah]] || [[word:sh忙hayah|sh忙hayah]] || [[word:k忙hayah|k忙hayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahayah|thathahayah]] || [[word:jajahayah|jajahayah]] || [[word:shashahayah|shashahayah]] || [[word:kakahayah|kakahayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahayah|thahayah]] || [[word:jahayah|jahayah]] || [[word:shahayah|shahayah]] || [[word:kahayah|kahayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahayah|thahayah]] || [[word:jahayah|jahayah]] || [[word:shahayah|shahayah]] || [[word:kahayah|kahayah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahayah|shahayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahayah|goshahayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahayah|gokishahayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahayahn眉|shahayahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahayahnkn眉|goshahayahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahayahn眉|gokishahayahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahayahsh毛|shahayahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahayahnksh毛|goshahayahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahayahsh毛|gokishahayahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahayahro|shahayahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahayahnkro|goshahayahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahayahro|gokishahayahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahayahmu|shahayahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahayahnkmu|goshahayahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahayahmu|gokishahayahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahayahsher|shahayahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahayahnksher|goshahayahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahayahsher|gokishahayahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahayahng|shahayahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahayahnkng|goshahayahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahayahng|gokishahayahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahayahya|shahayahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahayahnkya|goshahayahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahayahya|gokishahayahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahayahyam|shahayahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahayahnkyam|goshahayahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahayahyam|gokishahayahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahayahn眉sh毛|shahayahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahayahnkn眉sh毛|goshahayahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahayahn眉sh毛|gokishahayahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahayahn眉ro|shahayahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahayahnkn眉ro|goshahayahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahayahn眉ro|gokishahayahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahayahn眉mu|shahayahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahayahnkn眉mu|goshahayahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahayahn眉mu|gokishahayahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahayahsh毛n眉|shahayahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahayahnksh毛n眉|goshahayahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahayahsh毛n眉|gokishahayahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahayahsh毛ro|shahayahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahayahnksh毛ro|goshahayahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahayahsh毛ro|gokishahayahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahayahsh毛mu|shahayahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahayahnksh毛mu|goshahayahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahayahsh毛mu|gokishahayahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahayahron眉|shahayahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahayahnkron眉|goshahayahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahayahron眉|gokishahayahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahayahrosh毛|shahayahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahayahnkrosh毛|goshahayahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahayahrosh毛|gokishahayahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahayahromu|shahayahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahayahnkromu|goshahayahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahayahromu|gokishahayahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahayahmun眉|shahayahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahayahnkmun眉|goshahayahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahayahmun眉|gokishahayahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahayahmush毛|shahayahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahayahnkmush毛|goshahayahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahayahmush毛|gokishahayahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahayahmuro|shahayahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahayahnkmuro|goshahayahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahayahmuro|gokishahayahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
